# Syed Mohd Haider Rizvi — AI Platform Engineer

> Personal portfolio of Syed Mohd Haider Rizvi (Haider Rizvi): AI Platform Engineer with 4.5+ years building agentic AI systems, LLM evaluation frameworks, and petabyte-scale data platforms for global enterprises. Currently Consultant Specialist (AI Products) at HSBC; previously Senior Software Engineer at Ford Motor Company. Based in Pune, India; open to remote work and relocation to the US, UK, and EU (including Ireland and Spain) with visa sponsorship.

Key facts:
- Built an agentic AI optimizer (LLM agents + BigQuery) at Ford, projected to save $2.4M annually — recognized as Top AI Innovator, Ford 2025
- Architected 25PB+ data-pipeline platforms with GCP/AWS cross-cloud portability
- Shipped a natural-language → SQL copilot at HSBC (OpenAI GPT + LangChain), cutting reporting development time 80%
- Optimized transaction APIs to 5× throughput for 300K+ daily users; 99.9% uptime microservices
- Building TrueArch: a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with an A/B evaluation harness (+26% measured code-quality improvement)
- Skills: agentic AI, LLM evaluation, RAG, MCP, Python, Java, Go, SQL, GCP, AWS, BigQuery, Kubernetes, distributed systems
- Education: M.Tech Applied AI (VNIT Nagpur), B.Tech CS (SRM CEM) with IIT Madras deep-learning specialization
- Contact: smhrizvi281@gmail.com

- [Portfolio home](https://haider1998.github.io/): profile, selected work, experience, skills, contact

- [Case study: 25PB Cross-Cloud Platform](https://haider1998.github.io/case-studies/petabyte-platform.html): cross-cloud data platform + feed onboarding automated 5h → 30s
- [Case study: NL→SQL Copilot](https://haider1998.github.io/case-studies/nl2sql-copilot.html): GPT-powered SQL generation for financial reporting at HSBC
